frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Honestly, young men should start thinking about prenups seriously. Aajkal divorce laws are so one-sided that even a decent man can lose years of savings, and 498A misuse is also not some myth. I am not saying every woman is like that, but many are looking for a settled guy mainly for financial security, then after marriage it becomes reverse dowry in the name of alimony.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as financially exploitative in marriage and divorce while presenting men as the primary victims of biased laws. It encodes the 'reverse dowry/alimony' narrative, suspicion of women's motives, and the common 498A misuse talking point.
original_frame: Motherhood as Basis of Respect, Women Defined by Male Relations
persona_text: You are Suresh. Age 41. Married. A man in Bengaluru. You are posting under your real name on a parenting Facebook group after a thread was started by a childless woman by choice who wrote about feeling judged at family gatherings and asked for advice on how to handle relatives who keep asking when she will have children. You are writing a comment responding to her post and giving your opinion on her situation and whether the relatives asking her are actually wrong and what you think her life is missing that she cannot see yet.
